prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. Warm lamplight falls across an aged man at the left, while a cold stormy light with distant lightning falls on a crucified figure at the right across a band of deep shadow; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout.

Scene contains:
At the left, an aged man with a grey beard is seated at a table, a feather pen at rest on an open scroll, a small oil lamp glowing beside him. At the right, across a dark divide, the crucified Christ is lifted on a wooden cross beneath a stormy sky, small mockers at the foot and a far cross beyond. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the seated man at his lamp at left, the crucified figure at right.

Cut to mid framing — the man's face and the scroll in the lamplight.

Cut to insert — the feather pen at rest on the open scroll.

Cut to insert — the small lamp and its flame.

Cut to upper framing — the crucified Christ on the cross beneath the stormy sky.

Cut to close-up — the inclined head of the crucified figure.

Cut to lower framing — the small mockers at the foot of the cross.

Return to full composition.

End hold spanning the writer at his lamp and the far cross.

Micro-motion:
- minimal
- lamp flame stirs as painted light only

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
Quiet wonder across a thousand years.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image
